ModifySnapshotAttribute.snapshotId: The ID of the snapshot to modify
ModifySnapshotAttribute.snapshotName: New name for the snapshot; supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a letter; length 1–65
ModifySnapshotAttribute.retentionInDays: Retention period of the snapshot in days; the deletion time is recalculated from the modification time; valid range: 1–10000
